name: Vulcan Energy Resources Limited
summary: Vulcan Energy Resources Limited engages in the mineral exploration activities in Europe. It explores for lithium, copper, zinc, gold, silver, lead, magnetite, and sulfur deposits. The company holds interests in the Zero Carbon Lithium project; and L√É¬∏kken, Grimsdal, Storwartz, Killingdal, and Tverrfjellet projects located in Norway. In addition, it holds interests in the Vulcan Lithium project situated in the Upper Rhine Valley of Germany. The company was formerly known as Koppar Resources Limited and changed its name to Vulcan Energy Resources Limited in September 2019. Vulcan Energy Resources Limited was incorporated in 2018 and is based in Perth, Australia.
